title: Fix CGroup paths used for systemd CGroup mount
body: We already have functions for retrieving the container's CGroup path, so use them instead of manually generating a path.

Going to wait for the full VM tests to confirm this doesn't blow up the unit tests and merge
The tests we expect to go green are green. Merging so we can cut a release with this fix.
